title: iberis ciliata var. welwitschii
intro: Iberis ciliata var. welwitschii, also known as Rock Candy or Welwitsch's Candytuft, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Iberis ciliata var. welwitschii include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
